title: BEM-776 verify dispatch queue
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:29 (UTC+3)'
status_file=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem775_claude_internal_auditor_dispatch.status')
response_file=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem775_claude_internal_auditor_dispatch.response.json')
processed_file=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem775_claude_internal_auditor_dispatch.json')
http=status_file.read_text(errors='ignore').strip() if status_file.exists() else ''
response=response_file.read_text(errors='ignore')[:1000] if response_file.exists() else ''
runtime_path=Path('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
runtime={}
if runtime_path.exists():
    try: runtime=json.loads(runtime_path.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: runtime={}
responses=[]
for d in [Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]:
    if d.exists():
        for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file():
                txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
                low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower(); up=txt.upper()
                if 'bem772' in low or 'bem-772' in low or 'bem732' in low or 'bem-732' in low or 'multi-agent strategy' in low:
                    decision='MESSAGE'
                    if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
                    elif 'BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
                    elif 'APPROVED' in up or 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up: decision='APPROVED'
                    responses.append({'path':str(p),'decision':decision})
if responses:
    status='claude_response_found_after_queue_dispatch'
    blocker=None
    next_action='process real Claude response'
elif runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at'):
    status='queue_dispatch_runtime_seen_no_response'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_RUNTIME_SEEN_NO_RESPONSE','outcome':runtime.get('claude_action_outcome')}
    next_action='diagnose Claude action outcome/provider'
elif http in ['204','201','200']:
    status='queue_dispatch_accepted_wait_runtime'
    blocker={'code':'DISPATCH_ACCEPTED_RUNTIME_NOT_VISIBLE_YET','http':http}
    next_action='wait/check next tick for Claude runtime state and mailbox response'
elif http:
    status='queue_dispatch_failed'
    blocker={'code':'WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_FAILED','http':http,'response':response}
    next_action='repair workflow dispatch target or token permissions'
else:
    status='queue_dispatch_result_missing'
    blocker={'code':'WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_RESULT_MISSING','message':'Codex dispatch queue did not write status file.'}
    next_action='repair codex workflow dispatch queue processing'
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem776_next_after_dispatch_queue.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-776 Next After Dispatch Queue'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'HTTP: '+http+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-776 DISPATCH QUEUE RESULT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'HTTP: '+http+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'verify_claude_dispatch_queue_result.v1','bem':'BEM-776','status':status,'dispatch_status_file_exists':status_file.exists(),'dispatch_http_status':http,'dispatch_response_preview':response,'processed_file_exists':processed_file.exists(),'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'claude_outcome':runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'),'responses_found':len(responses),'responses':responses,'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem776_verify_claude_dispatch_queue_result.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem776_verify_claude_dispatch_queue_result.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-776 | Verify Claude Dispatch Queue Result | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'HTTP: '+http+sep+'Responses: '+str(len(responses))+sep+'Runtime started: '+str(runtime.get('started_at'))+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem776_verify_claude_dispatch_queue_result','status':status,'http':http,'responses_found':len(responses),'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem776_verify_claude_dispatch_queue_result.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-776 '+status+' http='+http+' responses='+str(len(responses))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Verified Codex workflow_dispatch_queue result for Claude dispatcher and routed next repair/check step')
"""
No issue comments.
